query:
SELECT pb.*, ab.name, ab.code 
FROM projectBranches pb 
JOIN activityBranches ab ON pb.branchId = ab.id 
WHERE pb.projectId = 510076 
LIMIT 10;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 7QDB1rdZo1Phrn3.bcf291fc06f4 --database A6U3GSLMGWuR2P4b85Hiyy --execute SELECT pb.*, ab.name, ab.code
